nasb.text: So Achish gave him Ziklag that day; therefore Ziklag has belonged to the kings of Judah to this day.

esv.text: So that day Achish gave him Ziklag. Therefore Ziklag has belonged to the kings of Judah to this day.

cnv.text: 那天，亞吉就把洗革拉賜給大衛，因此，洗革拉直到今日還是屬猶大王的。

ccb.text: 亚吉当天把洗革拉赐给他，因此那地方至今仍属犹大王。
